Architecture dossier · contract vs repository · proof vs power
GoalOSArchitecture
AscensionConsoleEvidenceArchitectureVerification
Trusted architecture

One contract. Three public surfaces.

AGIJobManager is the on-chain settlement machine. This repository is the public evidence institution. The legacy console remains the expert cockpit. The separation is the trust architecture.

Separation of powershuman-gated

Contract

Settlement logic and Ethereum state.

Ascension repo

Public proof room and product front door.

Evidence Docket

Claims, non-claims, proof, verification, risk.

Expert console

Advanced operator cockpit, not the public default.

Architecture map

On-chain machine

AGIJobManager at the canonical Ethereum Mainnet address is the settlement rail for escrowed job lifecycle actions.

Public institution

This GitHub Pages repository explains the machine, exposes evidence, and provides read-only planning objects.

Human authority

Any live wallet, approval, or Mainnet write remains outside this public site and requires expert human review.

Governance invariant

No proof, no settlement. No eval, no propagation. No rollback, no release. No wallet authority from a public proof page.
